mnemonics: I C.A.R.E. for AI Innovation: Identify, Classify, Assess, Review, Execute
keyPoints: Establishing a clear ethical risk assessment framework is paramount
Maintaining transparent and explainable AI systems builds public trust
Continuous monitoring and human oversight are non-negotiable for responsible deployment
commonMistakes: Focusing solely on technical innovation without considering societal impact
Treating ethics as a one-time compliance checkbox rather than an ongoing process
Assuming public acceptance of AI without proactive communication and education
